file: 4 Trig functions/4.5 Secant/4.5.3.1 (a+b sec)^m (d sec)^n (A+B sec).m

rules.source:
Int[csc[e_.+f_.*x_]*(a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^m_*(A_+B_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_]),x_Symbol] :=
  (A*b-a*B)*Cot[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^m/(a*f*(2*m+1)) + 
  (a*B*m+A*b*(m+1))/(a*b*(2*m+1)) \[Star] Int[Csc[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^(m+1),x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,A,B,e,f},x] && NeQ[A*b-a*B,0] && EqQ[a^2-b^2,0] && NeQ[a*B*m+A*b*(m+1),0] && LtQ[m,-1/2]

Int[csc[e_.+f_.*x_]*(a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^m_*(A_+B_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_]),x_Symbol] :=
  -B*Cot[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^m/(f*(m+1)) + 
  (a*B*m+A*b*(m+1))/(b*(m+1)) \[Star] Int[Csc[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^m,x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,A,B,e,f,m},x] && NeQ[A*b-a*B,0] && EqQ[a^2-b^2,0] && NeQ[a*B*m+A*b*(m+1),0] && Not[LtQ[m,-1/2]]

Int[(a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^m_*(d_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^n_*(A_+B_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_]),x_Symbol] :=
  a*A*Cot[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^(m-1)*(d*Csc[e+f*x])^n/(f*n) - 
  b/(a*d*n) \[Star] Int[(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^(m-1)*(d*Csc[e+f*x])^(n+1)*Simp[a*A*(m-n-1)-b*B*n-(a*B*n+A*b*(m+n))*Csc[e+f*x],x],x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,d,e,f,A,B},x] && NeQ[A*b-a*B,0] && EqQ[a^2-b^2,0] && GtQ[m,1/2] && LtQ[n,-1]

Int[(a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^m_*(d_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^n_*(A_+B_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_]),x_Symbol] :=
  -b*B*Cot[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^(m-1)*(d*Csc[e+f*x])^n/(f*(m+n)) + 
  1/(m+n) \[Star] Int[(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^(m-2)*(d*Csc[e+f*x])^n*
    Simp[a^2*A*(m+n)+a*b*B*n+(a*(2*A*b+a*B)*(m+n)+b^2*B*(m+n-1))*Csc[e+f*x]+b*(A*b*(m+n)+a*B*(2*m+n-1))*Csc[e+f*x]^2,x],x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,d,e,f,A,B,n},x] && NeQ[A*b-a*B,0] && NeQ[a^2-b^2,0] && GtQ[m,1] && Not[IGtQ[n,1] && Not[IntegerQ[m]]]

Int[(a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^m_*(d_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^n_*(A_+B_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_]),x_Symbol] :=
  -B*d*Cot[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^m*(d*Csc[e+f*x])^(n-1)/(f*(m+n)) + 
  d/(m+n) \[Star] Int[(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^(m-1)*(d*Csc[e+f*x])^(n-1)*
    Simp[a*B*(n-1)+(b*B*(m+n-1)+a*A*(m+n))*Csc[e+f*x]+(a*B*m+A*b*(m+n))*Csc[e+f*x]^2,x],x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,d,e,f,A,B},x] && NeQ[A*b-a*B,0] && NeQ[a^2-b^2,0] && LtQ[0,m,1] && GtQ[n,0]

Int[(a_+b_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^m_*(d_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_])^n_*(A_+B_.*csc[e_.+f_.*x_]),x_Symbol] :=
  -B*d^2*Cot[e+f*x]*(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^(m+1)*(d*Csc[e+f*x])^(n-2)/(b*f*(m+n)) + 
  d^2/(b*(m+n)) \[Star] Int[(a+b*Csc[e+f*x])^m*(d*Csc[e+f*x])^(n-2)*
    Simp[a*B*(n-2)+B*b*(m+n-1)*Csc[e+f*x]+(A*b*(m+n)-a*B*(n-1))*Csc[e+f*x]^2,x],x] /;
FreeQ[{a,b,d,e,f,A,B,m},x] && NeQ[A*b-a*B,0] && NeQ[a^2-b^2,0] && GtQ[n,1] && NeQ[m+n,0] && Not[IGtQ[m,1]]
